programme.title: Live: The Gallagher PREM
programme.desc: Bath Rugby v Saracens (Kick-off 7.45pm). Coverage of the match from The Recreation Ground. The last time these two sides met was at the end of November with Bath coming out on top thanks to an entertaining 36-29 victory. Saracens had led 22-17 at half-time before three tries in the second half from the hosts turned the game on its head. This is the first of two meetings between the two sides in the space of 15 days, with the next meeting coming in a round-of-16 tie in the European Champions Cup in early April.

programme.title: Live: Snooker World Open
programme.desc: Coverage from the final on the seventh day of the tournament, which takes place in Yushan, China. Scotland's John Higgins won his fifth World Open title last year after he defeated England's Joe O'Connor 10-6 in the final. His fifth triumph came 21 years after his first success in 1994 and was the first time he'd won the event since 2008. It meant that O'Connor had lost his second ranking final in a row after defeat by Gary Wilson in the 2022 Scottish Open.

programme.title: Live: Snooker World Open
programme.desc: Further coverage from the final on the seventh day of the tournament, which takes place in Yushan, China. Scotland's John Higgins won his fifth World Open title last year after he defeated England's Joe O'Connor 10-6 in the final. His fifth triumph came 21 years after his first success in 1994 and was the first time he'd won the event since 2008. It meant that O'Connor had lost his second ranking final in a row after defeat by Gary Wilson in the 2022 Scottish Open.
